question: Find the name of the employee who got the highest one time bonus.
gold_sql: SELECT t1.name FROM employee AS t1 JOIN evaluation AS t2 ON t1.Employee_ID  =  t2.Employee_ID ORDER BY t2.bonus DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.nm FROM employee AS T1 JOIN evaluation AS T2 ON T1.empl_id = T2.empl_id ORDER BY T2.bonu DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.nm FROM employee AS T1 JOIN evaluation AS T2 ON T1.empl_id = T2.empl_id ORDER BY T2.bonu DESC LIMIT 1;
